case_title: AURORE J RAYBIN VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAYBIN, AURORE J AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ASSIGNEE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAYBIN, AURORE J AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF RAYBIN, AURORE J

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAYBIN, AURORE J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.15 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,593.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
